Shuk.ra. Tlhe Guru is in its own house and the Shukra is in its exaltation.
Again the Chanclra-lagna in the Navamso chort is fulty aspected by the
Mangal.. Its lord. The Mangal conjoins the Aahu which in the et11 house is
deemed free from a Dosha. The ChaOOra is waxing.
In the Navamsa chart we may conclude that the Chandra-lagna is
strong.
The Surya. in the birth chart, occupies its own house. It is conjoined
by the Sh:ani. the lord of the Lagna and the Chandra-lagna. It is also
conjoined by the Buddha which rules a Trine and occupies a Kendra.
The Shani, however. rules the l~h house also and the Buddha owns
the S:h house besides the sth house.
The Surya is in the Navamsa of the Shukra which is a Yoga Karh,
i.e. .
